metadata.description: Official plugins for FlashQuery to power by your AI and your data sovereignty.

plugins.name: crm
plugins.description: A CRM powered by FlashQuery — contact management through conversation, not application.

plugins.name: fq-base
plugins.description: Core FlashQuery skills for writing, finding, and organizing vault documents and memories, plus vault maintenance commands.

plugins.name: product-brain
plugins.description: A product knowledge management plugin — capture, organize, and synthesize product intelligence through conversation.

plugins.name: fq-skill-creator
plugins.description: Meta-skill for creating new Claude skills that use FlashQuery MCP tools for document storage, search, memory, and data management.

plugins.name: context-manager
plugins.description: Save and restore conversation context across Claude sessions using FlashQuery's vault.

plugins.name: marp
plugins.description: Create and manage beautiful MARP presentation decks — SVG charts, dashboard components, dark/light themes, stored in your FlashQuery vault.
